user_query: My family is planning a road trip across Europe and we need to calculate the estimated fuel cost for the entire journey. Can you provide the currency exchange rate from USD to Euros? Also, recommend a random track from Deezer that we can add to our road trip playlist.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current currency exchange rate from USD to Euros.
Estimate the total fuel cost based on the provided route distance and fuel efficiency.
Recommend a random track from Deezer for the road trip playlist.
